content:
NotationExplanation
GφThe homogeneous subgraph according to the metapath φ
HRφThe homophily ratio of the homogeneous subgraph Gφ
o_vThe community strength of a leaf node v in T
odφThe aggregation order of Gφ
AφThe masked adjacency matrix of Gφ
SThe constructed high-order fusion graph
TThe hierarchical abstraction tree based on S
R*The pseudo label of the heterogeneous graph G
ZThe node embeddings generated from the masked autoencoder
ZTreeThe node embeddings generated from tree T
